final_answer:
Subject: Question about Schedule

Dear Curator,

I am writing to inquire about the upcoming exhibitions scheduled for the fall season.

I would love to attend some of the upcoming exhibitions if they align with my schedule.

Please let me know how I can register for these upcoming exhibitions online.

Best,
Alex<|im_end|>
